title: Pork and Dumplings German Comfort Food
description: Hearty pork and dumplings dish originating from Germany, perfect for a cold winter evening. This recipe serves 4-6 people and is relatively easy to prepare.

ingredients.name: Pork shoulder
ingredients.notes: You can also use pork belly for a fattier version.

instructions: In a large Dutch oven, cook the bacon over medium heat until crispy. Remove the bacon and set aside.
Add the pork cubes to the Dutch oven and cook until browned on all sides. Remove the pork and set aside with the bacon.
Add the chopped onion to the Dutch oven and cook until softened.
Add the caraway seeds, salt, and black pepper to the Dutch oven and stir to combine.
Add the browned pork cubes back to the Dutch oven and stir to combine with the onion mixture.
If using homemade dumpling dough, prepare according to your recipe.
If using store-bought dumpling dough, follow package instructions for preparation.
Place the dumplings on top of the pork mixture in the Dutch oven.
Dot the top of the dumplings with butter and cover the Dutch oven with a lid.
Transfer the Dutch oven to the preheated oven and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the dumplings are cooked through.
